{% extends "base.html" %} {% import "macros.html" as ui %} {% block body_class %}landing-page{% endblock body_class %} {% block content %}

Bop

A small, dynamically typed programming language for teaching and embedding in Rust applications.

Zero runtime dependencies. Tree-walker, bytecode VM, and Rust AOT execution. Embedded scripts receive only the capabilities their host explicitly provides.

Documentation {{ ui::icon(name="arrow-right", size="18") }} GitHub {{ ui::icon(name="arrow-right", size="18") }}
hello.bop bop run hello.bop 
{% raw %}fn greet(name) {
  return "Hello, {name}!"
}

for learner in ["Ada", "Grace", "you"] {
  print(greet(learner))
}{% endraw %}
OUTPUT Hello, Ada!   Hello, Grace!   Hello, you!
{% endblock content %}
